examples: I hope you're lying for the sake of titillation .
That TV show is nothing but titillation. It's got no substance.
This little family restaurant in Philadelphia, Mississippi, serves up top-notch titillation for the taste buds.
Titillation is important because he plans to submit the ads to CNN or MTV and then generate publicity by suing when they get rejected.
It is not the first time that supernatural romances have seduced female audiences--Jane Austen parodied the genre's peddling of terror as titillation in Northanger Abbey.
